title: cyclosorus dentatus var. glaber
intro: Cyclosorus dentatus var. glaber, also known as the Smooth Lip Fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. This plant is traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Cyclosorus dentatus var. glaber include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and aid in digestion. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
